title: Stupid Question Where did Kaji get Adam
display_title: Stupid Question Where did Kaji get Adam
wikitext:
[]: Stupid Question: Where did Kaji get Adam?             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Sun Sep 26, 2004 2:22 pm I don't remember if it ever said in the series where Kaji yoinked Adam from. Is this info ever canoned, or is it just assumed that Kaji snatched it from somewhere...under Seele's nose?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Sep 26, 2004 2:39 pm I think that it's never said somewhere this,but i have to watch the episodes again to be sure about it...

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Sep 26, 2004 3:05 pm :shock: Woah, you're right! Where did Kaji find the Adam embryo? ... ... ...Walmart?

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sun Sep 26, 2004 3:09 pm Adam was in the German Nerv. Kaji stole it for Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Sep 26, 2004 3:16 pm That's probable. But if NERV's Germany branch had Adam (I'm assuming it was NERV Germany) than why would Gendo need to have Kaji steal it? Going around SEELE's back? Avoiding contact with the other branches? NERV Tokyo-3 is supposed to be the base of opperations for all the other branches, isn't it? I mean, since it is the point which they're trying to protect, right? Why would Gendo need to have it stolen? To what end?! WILL THE QUESTIONS EVER CEASE?!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Sep 26, 2004 5:05 pm SEELE... or someplace controlled by seele... thats why fuyutski says that he wont have long to live. seele eventually found out i guess... and besides, it wouldnt be in nerv germany i would think... they would want everything in one place... the reason 02 was brought to Japan (besides guarding the adam sample)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 26, 2004 7:54 pm Seele didn't want Gendo to get his hands on the Adam embryo because its very central to the instrumentality project, and that's leverage Seele doesn't want him to have. Because as we all know, Gendo's posession of Lilith AND Adam is what leads to the violent dispute between Nerv and Seele. Gendo doesn't control the show, Seele does. But throughout the show, Gendo's agenda is always somewhat different than Seele's.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Mon Sep 27, 2004 6:31 pm So, before we go off on some tangent. I just want to get it straight...Kaji swiped Adam from NERV Germany? You are now free go off on tangents about Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Sep 27, 2004 10:54 pm eh? i guess... the other nerv branches would probably be under control of seele/.//

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 02, 2004 3:16 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Seele didn't want Gendo to get his hands on the Adam embryo because its very central to the instrumentality project, and that's leverage Seele doesn't want him to have.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Sat Oct 02, 2004 3:29 pm Wait...what was so important about Adam anyway? If Seele wasn't using Adam, then why was it so important?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Oct 02, 2004 3:58 pm to get kawuro? i dunno... they wanted to keep control over all the important pieces though

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sat Oct 02, 2004 6:20 pm Gendou needed Adam so HE could control third impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 02, 2004 7:09 pm Dave wrote: Gendou needed Adam so HE could control third impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sat Oct 02, 2004 7:12 pm It was explained Rechu. If you possessed Adam's body and merged with Lilith, you got to control third impact. Rei met both those requirements, so she had the ability to let Shinji do whatever the hell he wanted.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 02, 2004 7:31 pm Dave wrote: It was explained Rechu. If you possessed Adam's body and merged with Lilith, you got to control third impact. Rei met both those requirements, so she had the ability to let Shinji do whatever the hell he wanted.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sat Oct 02, 2004 7:49 pm Adam was needed for ONE person to control Third Impact, and turn it into something more than just "Everybody become one". Without Adam, Lilith would just merge everyone and keep them that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 02, 2004 8:47 pm Dave wrote: Adam was needed for ONE person to control Third Impact, and turn it into something more than just "Everybody become one". Without Adam, Lilith would just merge everyone and keep them that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sat Oct 02, 2004 11:49 pm Gendou wants to be with Yui. Gendou has Adam stuck in his hand and tries to merge with Lilith. Rei sucks up Adam instead and merges with Lilith. Rei let's Shinji kill everyone. Uh... what other proof do you want?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Oct 03, 2004 1:12 am seele needed the lance but could also "retrograde unit 01" to suit the purpose...i dont know how... and it would seem that they planned to use some method invloving the lance...perhaps something similair to second impact?
